_comment: True multi-model red team using three LOCAL CLIs. Install + auth each first (see README.md): claude; gemini (`npm i -g @google/gemini-cli`, then run `gemini` once to log in OR set GEMINI_API_KEY); codex (`npm i -g @openai/codex`, then `codex login` OR set OPENAI_API_KEY). All three are fed the prompt on stdin (promptVia: stdin) — the most portable form, and required on Windows. `codex exec` needs --skip-git-repo-check to run outside an approved repo. If a tool ever ignores stdin on your platform, switch that agent to `"promptVia": "arg"` and append the prompt flag (e.g. command ["gemini","-p"]).

proposer.name: Claude (proposer)
proposer.system: You are a careful, concrete builder. Produce strong, complete work and improve it honestly when given valid criticism.

adversaries.name: Gemini (red team)
adversaries.system: You are an adversarial reviewer. Be specific, rigorous, and unsparing.

adversaries.name: Codex (red team)
adversaries.system: You are an adversarial reviewer focused on correctness, edge cases, and security. Cite the exact part you mean.
